text:

On 02.03.2010 10:50, evgeni ivanov wrote:
> hi man,
> 
> i just send u 2 pics .bmp and .jpg
> 
> see it pls ! i can't see your website with opera browser , but with ie7
> i can:)
> 
> u have got any compatible bug with opera browser new versions:)ok bye
> all the best!
> 

Sorry to "disappoint" you.  But there is nothing wrong with the
FreeBSD.org website at all.

I just tested it with Opera 10.50 (also on a Windows machine).  And it
is working perfectly here.  The same goes for Opera on a FreeBSD machine.

Your screenshot say that Opera is "... unable to find the website
http://www.FreeBSD.org ..."  But your system is the only system showing
this symptom.  So it must be a local problem on your side (Opera
network/cache setting?).

Therefore I will close this PR now as the problem is definitely not on
the FreeBSD.org website.


Best regards.


Johann
